MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAYBAL, DENNIS SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-23-2001 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT P01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-29-2001 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

SETT CONF: HON. GERALD RAGAN; CLERK: DAN MACDUFF; REPORTER: NORMA REAY. PLTF & DEFT PRESENT. PLTF CSL: JOHN ZANHGI. STIP TO JUDGMENT FOR DEFT. RESTIT OF PREMISES TO PLTF, STAYED TIL 5PM ON 6/25/01. IF DEFT VACATES, DAMAGES OF $2,107.00 WAIVED BY PLTF. SECURITY/CLEANING DEPOSITS WAIVED BY DEFT. IF DEFT FAILS TO COMPLY WITH TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE AGREEMENT, PLTF MAY EXECUTE THE JUDGMENT, INCLUDING ABOVE DAMAGES. IF PLTF MEETS ALL TERMS AND CONDITTIONS, PLTF WILL MOVE TO VACATE THE JUDGMENT AND WILL DISMISS THIS ACTION. PLTF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE A JUDGMENT. THE TRIAL DATE IS VACATED.
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT P01
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES, FILED BY PLAINTIFF RAYBAL, DENNIS BOIS, RICHARD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOIS, RICHARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 534 HYDE ST. #5, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $2,107.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,107.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-25-2001, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES ALL BACK RENT AND DAMAGES IF DEFT VACATES THE PREMISES PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
